key_provisions.heading: OUTDOOR ADVERTISEMENTS AND SIGNAGE
key_provisions.summary: This document outlines the assessment criteria for outdoor advertisements and signage in the City

key_provisions.heading: POLICY OBJECTIVES
key_provisions.summary: 1. To encourage good quality, well considered advertising signage within the City of Melville.

key_provisions.heading: POLICY SCOPE
key_provisions.summary: The provisions of this policy apply to all signs within the scheme area under Local Planning Scheme

key_provisions.heading: DEFINITIONS USED IN POLICY
key_provisions.summary: Means any word, letter, graphic, image, model, picture, sign, pattern, placard, board, notice device

key_provisions.heading: POLICY STATEMENT
key_provisions.summary: Signage which meets the criteria set out in Clauses 1-4 is exempt from the need for development

key_provisions.heading: 1 Signage within the Residential zone
key_provisions.summary: Signage to be installed on properties within the Residential zone shall satisfy the following:

key_provisions.heading: 1.1 Home Occupations & Home Businesses
key_provisions.summary: Advertising signage associated with an approved Home Occupation or Home

key_provisions.heading: 1.2 Display Home Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage displayed for the period over which buildings are on display for public

key_provisions.heading: 1.3 Commercial Properties within the Residential zone
key_provisions.summary: Signage displayed on commercial properties located within the Residential zone

key_provisions.heading: 1.4 Real Estate Signage
key_provisions.summary: (a) Individual signage shall not exceed 1.8m2 in area;

key_provisions.heading: 2 Signage on land which is not within the Residential zone
key_provisions.summary: Applications for signage to be installed on Zones other than the Residential Zone shall satisfy all of

key_provisions.heading: 2.1 Ground Based Signage
key_provisions.summary: Advertising signage which is not attached or otherwise affixed to a building.

key_provisions.heading: 2.2 Pylon Signage
key_provisions.summary: Freestanding and elevated signage installed at the top of a column/s or pole/s and

key_provisions.heading: 2.3 Monolith/Tombstone Signage
key_provisions.summary: Freestanding vertical sign protruding directly out of the ground, not elevated on a

key_provisions.heading: 2.4 Window Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage affixed to either the interior or exterior of the glazed area of a window and

key_provisions.heading: 2.5 Projecting Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage attached at right angles to a building or structure.

key_provisions.heading: 2.6 Below-Awning Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage fixed or hanging from the under-side of an awning or verandah.

key_provisions.heading: 2.7 Awning Fascia Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage fixed to the outer or return fascia of an awning or verandah.

key_provisions.heading: 2.9 Real Estate Signage
key_provisions.summary: (a) Not erected or installed within 1.5 metres of any part of a crossover or street

key_provisions.heading: 2.10 Construction Related Signage
key_provisions.summary: Signage displayed during the construction phase of an approved development and

key_provisions.summary: The following types of signs, associated with the activities of a sporting club do not

key_provisions.heading: 3.6 School Signs
key_provisions.summary: (a) Signs to be a maximum height of 3m when measured from ground level;
